nodes.label: AI as planning and structuring tool
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to generate outlines for longer work

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I sent those back to the AI and asked if it had any suggestions about grouping or ordering the questions differently

nodes.label: AI as writing assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to authentic writing
nodes.grounding_span: AI is a tool, just like a thesaurus or a graphic organizer

nodes.label: AI integration with existing platforms
nodes.grounding_span: I like how it is starting to integrate with other platforms

nodes.label: Client trust and credibility
nodes.grounding_span: My clients trust me and I value that

nodes.label: Creative autonomy and enjoyment of writing
nodes.grounding_span: I like to do the actual writing myself - partly because I enjoy it

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: I love that a lot of the tedious background work can be handled by AI

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for planning
nodes.grounding_span: It was really helpful, I copied the outline into a document and was able to create a template

nodes.label: Distrust of AI for factual accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: If anything is incorrect, it makes me look bad and I could lose a long-term client. I'm not taking that risk.

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: I sent those back to the AI and asked if it had any suggestions about grouping or ordering the questions differently

nodes.label: Resistance to AI for authentic writing
nodes.grounding_span: There are a lot of people who use AI and then call themselves writers

nodes.label: Pragmatic acceptance of AI as a tool
nodes.grounding_span: I didn't rant about social media destroying my job, I learned to use hashtags and images

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — works back and forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I tweaked a couple of the suggestions. Then, I sent those back to the AI and asked if it had any suggestions

nodes.label: Domain-based boundary setting — separates creative from non-creative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI for the planning any myself for the execution
